Tier ID
- Step Therapy Indicator
- Quantity Limit
- Prior authorization
- Linking variables to the PDE file record:- Formulary Identification Number (in each sub-file)

Why do researchers request this file?
- To examine differences in utilization based on formulary inclusion or restrictions
- To examine plan differences in formularies
Special considerations
- Linking variables provide information for each Part D Drug Event (PDE) record.
